title: South Station Starbucks license suspended following viral video of rodents in shop
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The inspection report notes evidence of fruit flies, mouse droppings, and rodent activity, leading the department to deem an “imminent health hazard exists” at the Starbucks site.
Authorities have temporarily suspended the license of the Starbucks at South Station after a viral video surfaced showing multiple rodents inside the coffee shop.
Boston Inspectional Services conducted an evaluation of the Starbucks, located at 700 Atlantic Ave.

title: 1 woman killed, another injured in late-night Taunton crash
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News The driver, 26-year-old Selina Mendez, was rushed to a local hospital with life-threatening injuries and died soon after.
By Abby Patkin July 20, 2026 | 2:26 PM 1 minute to read One woman was killed and another injured late Friday night in a single-car crash in Taunton, authorities said.

title: Celtics announce full 2026 preseason schedule
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics The Celtics will play Philadelphia twice during the four-game preseason.
Hugo Gonzalez AP Photo/Michael Dwyer The Celtics released their four-game preseason schedule on Monday, and half of the matchups involve Jaylen Brown’s new team.
Boston will have a home and home series with Philadelphia, along with a road contest in Cleveland, and a home game against Charlotte.

title: Community Healthlink more than doubles layoffs as closure nears
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News The Worcester-based behavioral health provider now plans to lay off 231 workers, up from 78 announced in May, as it prepares to close.
Many employees are expected to join new operators.
